skipped.ui-ux: No screens in iteration 002; the consumer-facing surfaces are the ratchet refusal, the announced bypass, the W14 warning, and the timeout teaching - console texts owned as requirements (FR-018/FR-022 as amended) with message-content tests.

design_analysis.decision: Option B - one pure authorization primitive consumed by the A2 covering set (sync ratchet, validator, resume re-confirm, hard gates); first-class recorded reconciliation (kind=retroactive entries; revert behind explicit confirm); fail-closed TrackerHonestyCheck feeding the announced gate-level bypass; catalog default_timeout_seconds rows (antigravity 900, claude 600, codex 600, copilot 300 - self-host field timings accepted as measurement evidence); W14 resolved-value warning; teaching texts per the amended approve/deny UX; live-door env cascade + independence_source
